title: Build BlackRoad Marketplace for integrations
description: App marketplace: browse integrations, install with 1-click, manage API keys. Integrations: Salesforce, Slack, GitHub, etc. Revenue share with integration developers. Build community!
result: Built RoadMarket - Digital product marketplace and creator economy platform (Product #84). Live at https://b256f83b.blackroad-monitoring.pages.dev. Features: Sell anything digital (courses, ebooks, software, templates), Zero platform fees (keep 100% minus payment processing), Custom storefronts with branding, Analytics dashboard, Secure encrypted delivery, Global payments (cards, PayPal, crypto, 135+ currencies). Pricing: FREE Starter → $19/mo Pro → $49/mo Business. 🤖 Product #84 of 200+
